route.name: Death Valley Dustup
route.description: Public GPX Death Valley desert route with remote roads, long climbs, washboard, sand, and severe water/heat logistics.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Death Valley desert route with remote roads, long climbs, washboard, sand, and severe water/heat logistics.
route.bestSeason: Cool season only; July is blocked by extreme heat.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Death Valley desert route with remote roads, long climbs, washboard, sand, and severe water/heat logistics.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Water scarcity is a core hazard; every source must be verified and substantial capacity is required.
resources.food: Sparse resupply; carry food and verify all services.
resources.camping: Desert camping must follow current park/public-land rules and conditions.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Do not promote for next weekend.
Keep as a winter California desert route.
Require a full heat/water/emergency plan before future use.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

blockers: Current July 10-13 screening blocks ride-ready promotion. Keep as planning/reference only.
requiredFixes: Resolve the July-window blocker or choose a different route.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?

promotionChecklist.targetWindowNote: Death Valley is not a July weekend bikepacking target; extreme heat blocks promotion.

promotionChecklist.finalDecisionNote: Source-backed route remains planning-grade; target-window blockers prevent ride-ready promotion only.
